scores.notes: Code is well-structured and idiomatic. Minor issue: self._service_name and self._database_ready() are referenced but not defined in the class context shown, so it wouldn't run as-is without those being defined elsewhere. The layer structure, add_layer/replan pattern, config access, relation data access, and HTTP health check are all correct. Extra details (period, timeout, threshold, status setting) are real APIs used correctly, not hallucinations.
